dashboard.no_results: No clinics found. We'll keep searching.

serviceType.heading: What kind of appointment do you need?

emergency.heading: Call 911 now
emergency.subheading: This is a life-threatening emergency. Do not wait.
emergency.placeholder_location: Enter your full address or location
emergency.disclaimer: SantéNav cannot contact emergency services on your behalf. Call 911 directly.

instructions.consultation_urgente: Bring your RAMQ card and a list of your current medications. Arrive 10 minutes early. Do not eat or drink before arrival if you are unsure whether fasting is required.
instructions.consultation_semi_urgente: Bring your RAMQ card and a list of your current medications. Arrive 10 minutes early.
instructions.suivi: Bring your RAMQ card and any recent test results or referral letters. Arrive 5 minutes early.
instructions.suivi_pediatrique: Bring the child's RAMQ card and vaccination record. Arrive 10 minutes early.
instructions.suivi_grossesse: Bring your RAMQ card and your pregnancy booklet (carnet de maternité) if you have one. Arrive 10 minutes early.

chatbot.heading: Health assistant
chatbot.disclaimer: This assistant helps choose a care type. It is not a medical diagnosis.
